'''ngolangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:piano|piano]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-l-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:piano|piano]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngolangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || ngolangithi || ngolangiji || ngolangishi || ngolangiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || ngolanguthu || ngolanguju || ngolangushu || ngolanguku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || ngolanguthu || ngolanguju || ngolangushu || ngolanguku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || ngolangufthuf || ngolangufjuf || ngolangufshuf || ngolangufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || ngolangethe || ngolangeje || ngolangeshe || ngolangeke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || ngolangotho || ngolangojo || ngolangosho || ngolangoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || ngolangotho || ngolangojo || ngolangosho || ngolangoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || ngolangofthof || ngolangofjof || ngolangofshof || ngolangofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || ngolangïfthïf || ngolangïfjïf || ngolangïfshïf || ngolangïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || ngolangïfthïf || ngolangïfjïf || ngolangïfshïf || ngolangïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || ngolangïfthïf || ngolangïfjïf || ngolangïfshïf || ngolangïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || ngolangïfthïf || ngolangïfjïf || ngolangïfshïf || ngolangïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || ngolangæthæ || ngolangæjæ || ngolangæshæ || ngolangækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || ngolangatha || ngolangaja || ngolangasha || ngolangaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || ngolangatha || ngolangaja || ngolangasha || ngolangaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || ngolangafthaf || ngolangafjaf || ngolangafshaf || ngolangafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || ngolangasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || ngolangshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || ngolangroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || ngolangmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || ngolangyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gongolangnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gongolangnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gongolangnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gongolangnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || ngolalangasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || ngolalangshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || ngolalangroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || ngolalangmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || ngolalangyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gongolalangnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gongolalangnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gongolalangnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gongolalangnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || ngelængasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || ngelængshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || ngelængroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || ngelængmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || ngelængyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gongelængnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gongelængnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gongelængnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gongelængnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || ngolfangasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || ngolfangshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || ngolfangroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || ngolfangmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || ngolfangyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gongolfangnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gongolfangnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gongolfangnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gongolfangnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
